chapter_title.ar: حَدِيثُ عَلِيِّ بْنِ الْحُسَيْنِ (عليه السلام) مَعَ يَزِيدَ
chapter_title.en: Hadith of Ali Bin Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup> with Yazeed<sup>la</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح على الظاهر - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 228)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح على الظاهر - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 228)
text: إِنَّ اللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ أَعْفَى نَبِيَّكُمْ أَنْ يَلْقَى مِنْ أُمَّتِهِ مَا لَقِيَتِ الْأَنْبِيَاءُ مِنْ أُمَمِهَا وَ جَعَلَ ذَلِكَ عَلَيْنَا.

en.hubeali: H 14800 – Yahya Al-Halby, from Haroun Bin Al-Kharjat, from Abu Baseer, who has said:

Abu Abdullahasws having said that: ‘Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic Exempted your Prophetsaww from facing from hissaww community what the Prophetsas faced from their communities, and Made that for usasws’.
en.sarwar: 353. Yahya Al-Halby, from Haroun Bin Al-Kharjat, from Abu Baseer, who has said: Abu Abdullah (a.s.) having said that: ‘Allah (azwj) Mighty and Majestic Exempted your Prophet (saww) from facing from his (saww) community what the Prophets (as) faced from their communities, and Made that for us (a.s.)’.
